title: Crispy Korean Date Bowl
description: A sweet and savory vegetarian dish featuring crispy Korean-style fried dates in a bowl.
instructions: Prepare the dates by washing and patting them dry.
Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the crispy fried shallots and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the dates to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side.
In a small bowl, mix together soy sauce, brown sugar, and grated ginger.
Brush the sauce on the dates during the last minute of cooking.
Serve the crispy dates in a deep-fried or crispy rice bowl.
Garnish with additional crispy fried shallots if desired.
